_meta.description: Smart calculator for flooring quantities — coverage & waste estimation tool for e-commerce merchants on Salla.

settings.card_subtitle: Set the default calculation rules for your store's products
settings.banner_body: The values below apply automatically as global defaults across all products — saving you time. You can always customize any individual product from the Products page.
settings.coverage_hint: How many square meters (m²) does one box or unit cover?
settings.waste_hint: Extra material added to account for cutting waste and installation layout.

instructions.subtitle: Smart calculator for e-commerce
instructions.description:
Welcome to your smart helper!
We help your customers calculate exactly how many boxes they need based on their room size — including cutting waste.
Let's get your store ready:
instructions.footer_note: Quantix Smart Calculator · Set up your rules once and automate product calculations across your store
instructions.step1_desc: Enter your default coverage and cutting waste percentage. These values apply automatically to all products to save you time — but you can always set custom numbers for any specific product later.
instructions.step2_desc: Go to your products list and flip the switch to enable the calculator. If a product covers more or less space than the default, you can customize its numbers directly from the list.
instructions.step2_badge: Turn on the Calculator for Your Products
instructions.step3_desc: See exactly how the calculator looks to your customers. Use the Preview button next to any product to check the live storefront view, and manage active items directly from the dashboard.
instructions.step4_desc: Each product can use 2D mode (Length × Height) for flat items like banners, stickers, and flat panels, or 3D mode (Length × Width × Height) for volumetric items like boxes, cabinets, and furniture. Click the 2D / 3D badge next to any product to switch between modes.

toggle_with_toast.toast_coverage_required: Set a unit coverage for this product, or configure a global default in Settings.
toggle_with_toast.toast_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
